loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing per-member roster stats for PQ issues (I-THD, V-THD, PF Gap, Neutral); global scalar KPIs and voltage harmonics are not measured by this panel's member meters.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-panel THD and event counts over the selected period; limit thresholds are not measured by this meter and are left blank.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing I-THD focus; voltage harmonics (V-THD) are not measured by this meter (voltage-thd columns have no data), so V-THD stats are omitted.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD for feeders with live data; V-THD columns (thd_voltage_*) are present in schema but have no logged data (has_data=N) for this asset, so V-THD values will be blank.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic signatures (I-THD, V-THD) and active power for live feeders; 3rd harmonic, K-factor, and peak-THD columns are not measured on this asset's member meters.
